scripts.fixtures:excel: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/generate_excel_scenarios.ps1 && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/excel_oracle.ps1 -InputPath tests/fixtures/excel-scenarios.json -OutputPath tests/fixtures/excel-results.json && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/generate_excel_feature_scenarios.ps1 && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/excel_oracle.ps1 -InputPath tests/fixtures/excel-feature-scenarios.json -OutputPath tests/fixtures/excel-feature-results.json
scripts.quality: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
